name: openscad-designer
description: Interactive parametric OpenSCAD modeling with generated controls and a rotatable 3D preview.

interface.shortDescription: Design printable parametric models in chat.
interface.longDescription: Create and refine OpenSCAD source, adjust Customizer parameters in an interactive form, inspect the rendered mesh, and export STL or 3MF geometry.
defaultPrompt: Design a parametric OpenSCAD part with me.
Open this SCAD model in the interactive designer.
Adjust this model and export printable geometry.
